description_long: This horse carriage features a classic wooden frame with a rectangular base supported by four large spoked wheels. The carriage is topped with a gray, arched fabric canopy that covers the passenger compartment, providing shelter from the elements. The sides of the carriage are reinforced with vertical wooden slats, and the front includes a long wooden shaft for attaching to a horse. The interior appears open and spacious, with wooden planks forming the floor and a raised section at the rear, likely for seating. The wheels are robust and made of wood with metal rims, designed for durability on urban roads. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on function and historical authenticity.
description: A wooden horse carriage with a gray arched fabric canopy, four large spoked wheels, and a long front shaft for horse attachment. The design is functional and historically styled, with an open passenger compartment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the carriage, the arched gray canopy, and both large spoked wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open entrance to the passenger compartment and the width of the canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the shaft extending forward and the rear structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back opening of the carriage and the interior floor layout.
attribute_carriage_roof_style: The roof is an arched, canopy-style cover made of fabric, providing an enclosed yet airy shelter for passengers.
attribute_passenger_seating_arrangement: The carriage has a single open compartment with a raised rear section for forward-facing bench seating, accommodating one or two rows of passengers.
